sections.paragraph:
Original: בּתוּל

Transliteration: bethûl

Phonetic: beth-ool'

BDB Definition:

Bethul = "God destroys" or " man of God" or " dweller in God"
  1. a town of Simeon in the south (also spelled 'Bethuel')

Origin: for H1328

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
